articles.title: Proposed SC law would protect children from AI exploitation
articles.description: Artificial intelligence can be used to generate realistic images in seconds, and predators no longer need physical access to a child to cause lasting harm.
articles.content: South Carolina has a responsibility to protect its children from the predators, platforms and emerging technologies that can be used to exploit them. That responsibility does not disappear simply because the threat is new, digital or powered by artif... [3866 chars]

articles.content:

articles.title: AI Boom and Inflation: Key Market Influencers Ahead of Nvidia and Walmart Earnings
articles.description: Next week, the market will closely analyze the earnings reports from Nvidia, a semiconductor powerhouse, and major retailers like Walmart, amidst significant AI advancements and inflation concerns. The tech-heavy indices have surged, with caution over whether the rally, led by a limited set of stocks, is sustainable.
articles.content: The U.S. stock market is set for a pivotal week as investors turn their attention to earnings reports from semiconductor leader Nvidia and top retailers, including Walmart. The market has been largely driven by two key factors: the rise of artificial... [731 chars]

articles.title: Intercom, now called Fin, launches an AI agent whose only job is managing another AI agent
articles.description: Intercom, now called Fin, has launched Fin Operator, an AI agent that manages customer service AI, signaling a new phase in enterprise automation and support operations.
articles.content:
The company formerly known as Intercom just did something that no major customer service platform has attempted at scale: it built an AI agent whose sole job is to manage another AI agent.

articles.title: How RecursiveMAS speeds up multi-agent inference by 2.4x and reduces token usage by 75%
articles.description: UIUC and Stanford's RecursiveMAS lets AI agents collaborate in embedding space instead of text, cutting token usage by 75% and speeding inference 2.4x.
articles.content:
One of the key challenges of current multi-agent AI systems is that they communicate by generating and sharing text sequences, which introduces latency, drives up token costs, and makes it difficult to train the entire system as a cohesive unit.

articles.title: Samsung strike could shake up the AI landscape
articles.description: Samsung and a South Korean labour union could not reach an agreement to salvage relations ahead of a planned strike on May 21.
articles.content:
Samsung and a South Korean labour union could not reach an agreement on Tuesday. These negotiations were a last-ditch effort to salvage relations ahead of a planned strike on May 21.
